# Game Day GHL Growth System

## What This Is
A complete growth system for Game Day Men's Health franchises, built by Speaker Engine AI. Three products packaged as "The Game Day Game Plan": GHL Workflows (8 automation systems), AI Integrator Program (trained operator placement), and Expert Series v3 (content engine powered by Titan Genome + Genius Tap).

## Key Context
- Client: Tony D'Agostino (owns Speaker Engine AI + 2 Game Day Men's Health franchise locations)
- Game Day: 257+ franchise locations, $1.89M avg revenue/location, $150-250/mo patient memberships
- Secondary engagement: Dr. Leigh Vinocur (Expert Series v3 + LinkedIn Autopilot + AI Integrator for personal brand)
- Expected revenue impact: $741K-$1.05M additional annual revenue per location
- AI Integrator pricing: $1,000 placement + $300/month
- Expert Series pricing: $5,000 setup + $1,500/month (Tier 3)

## Repo Structure
- /ghl-system/ — GHL workflow configs and message templates
- /content-system/ — Expert Series and Genius Tap content samples
- /ai-integrator/ — Operator playbook, KPIs, training
- /research/ — Market research, competitive intel, franchise analysis
- /sales/ — One-pagers, strategy docs, proposals
- /docs/ — Supporting documentation

## Related Repos
- jbellsolutions/Titan-Genome-Content-Multiplier — Content engine (Expert Series v3)
- jbellsolutions/genius-tap-content-system — Ongoing monthly content production
- jbellsolutions/speakeragent-ops — Operations dashboard

## Healthcare Compliance
HIPAA-sensitive. No patient data in this repo. All templates use generic/anonymized examples. GHL HIPAA add-on ($297/mo) required for deployment.
